purpose: Assign complete actual-app evidence to every DocPilot feature guide.
staticRule: Use annotated actual-app images when motion, timing, and spatial change are not part of the claim.
demoRule: Use an actual-app demo when the claim depends on sequence, spatial change, typing, dragging, or performance.
